_readme: Converted from planner's 'Export approved JSON' into the entries-shape that the LUXA app's catalog.data.js loader consumes. Bathroom uses the original Lighto products (now in catalog.data.js). Each hotspot can carry an optional closeUpImage — the LUXA app shows it as the main image in product detail when entered via that hotspot, with a 'In context'/'Catalog' thumb switcher.

description.es: Combina iluminación ambiente, de pared y decorativa de la familia Aballs para un living completo y equilibrado donde cada pieza tiene protagonismo.
description.en: A warm living setup combining ceiling, wall and decorative lighting in a balanced residential composition.

tagline.es: Iluminación funcional y limpia para el baño

description.es: Combina la luz general del techo Lighto con un acento de pared Lighto al lado del espejo — un baño funcional y elegante donde la colección entera dialoga visualmente.
description.en: Pairs a Lighto ceiling globe for ambient fill with a Lighto wall light at the mirror — a clean, functional bathroom where the whole family speaks the same visual language.

description.es: Un colgante Aballs centrado sobre la mesa con luz de pared de apoyo para que la mesa sea protagonista mientras el resto del ambiente queda bien iluminado.
description.en: A focused dining lighting setup with a centered pendant and supporting wall and accent lights.
